text.title: Pattern Bank Tagging Schema Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Pattern Bank Tagging Schema end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: adopt-vocabulary
step.action: Pin the closed vocabularies in the schema artefact.

step.name: tag-each-entry
step.action: Apply one surface + one intent + one pattern_type + one severity tag per entry.

step.name: validate-coverage
step.action: Run validator; ensure no entry is missing any tag.

step.name: refresh-vocab
step.action: Quarterly: review new entries; expand vocab if patterns recur in 'other'.
